top_signals.title: Antarctic Treaty meeting in Hiroshima fails to reach accord
top_signals.summary: The impact of geopolitical rifts on the meeting could not be denied, Japan's ambassador in charge of the gathering said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: GSDF Osprey to use U.S. base in Okinawa for first time
top_signals.summary: As part of a June exercise between the GSDF and the U.S. Marine Corps, the two are considering a plan to airlift a mock patient from Miyako Island to the U.S. Futenma base.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
